mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_ai_conversation" (username, gym_id, role, title) VALUES (#{username, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id, username, gym_id, role, title, created_at, updated_at FROM "h_ai_conversation" WHERE username = #{username, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_ai_message" (conversation_id, role, content, tool_name, tool_args, tool_result, token_in, token_out) VALUES (#{conversationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toolName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{toolArgs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), CAST(#{toolResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{tokenIn, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tokenOut, jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: SELECT message_id, conversation_id, role, content, tool_name, tool_args::text AS tool_args, tool_result::text AS tool_result, token_in, token_out, created_at FROM "h_ai_message" WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY message_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_ai_tool_audit" (conversation_id, message_id, username, gym_id, tool_name, classification, params, status, result_summary, error) VALUES (#{conversationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{messageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{toolName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classification, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{params, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
